category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Nigeria market (SON / NIS respirator standard adopting EN 149, Factories Act occupational framework, SONCAP conformity assessment, NAFDAC for medical masks).

title.en: China-to-Nigeria PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入尼日利亚（SON/SONCAP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入奈及利亞（SON/SONCAP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Nigerian market-access requirements: Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON) Nigerian Industrial Standards (NIS) adopting EN 149, the mandatory SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP) Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, the Factories Act occupational-safety framework, in-country importer obligations, and NAFDAC registration where the product is a medical mask.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与尼日利亚市场准入要求对照：尼日利亚标准组织（SON）的尼日利亚工业标准（NIS）采纳EN 149、强制性的SON合格评定计划（SONCAP）产品证书及逐批次SONCAP证书、《工厂法》职业安全框架、在地进口商义务，以及产品属医用口罩时的NAFDAC注册。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與奈及利亞市場准入要求對照：奈及利亞標準組織（SON）的奈及利亞工業標準（NIS）採納EN 149、強制性的SON合格評定計劃（SONCAP）產品證書及逐批次SONCAP證書、《工廠法》職業安全框架、在地進口商義務，以及產品屬醫用口罩時的NAFDAC註冊。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Nigerian law, SON / NIS standards, SONCAP scope and accredited certification-body practice, and destination-port clearance procedure with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical mask (NAFDAC) boundary described herein requires case-by-case regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行尼日利亚法律、SON/NIS标准、SONCAP范围及获认可认证机构实践，以及目的地港口清关程序。本文所述的PPE与医用口罩（NAFDAC）界定需要逐案进行法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行奈及利亞法律、SON/NIS標準、SONCAP範圍及獲認可認證機構實踐，以及目的地港口清關程序。本文所述的PPE與醫用口罩（NAFDAC）界定需要逐案進行法規分析。

answer_first.en: Filtering respirators imported into Nigeria fall under the Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON), which publishes Nigerian Industrial Standards (NIS) that commonly adopt EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3) for filtering half masks. Market access is gated by the mandatory SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP): a Product Certificate (PC) must be obtained and a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate (SC) issued before goods can clear customs at Lagos (Apapa / Tin Can) or Onne. Chinese GB 2626 (KN95) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the NIS/EN 149 conformity basis; an accredited test report against the adopted standard and a registered in-country importer are required. Medical masks are instead regulated by NAFDAC.
answer_first.zh: 进口至尼日利亚的过滤式呼吸器由尼日利亚标准组织（SON）监管，SON发布的尼日利亚工业标准（NIS）通常就过滤式半面罩采纳EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）。市场准入受强制性SON合格评定计划（SONCAP）控制：须先取得产品证书（PC），并就每批货物签发SONCAP证书（SC），方可在拉各斯（阿帕帕/锡坎）或奥内港清关。中国GB 2626（KN95）检测报告本身不满足NIS/EN 149的合格评定基础；须有针对所采纳标准的获认可检测报告及一名注册的在地进口商。医用口罩则由NAFDAC监管。
answer_first.zht: 進口至奈及利亞的過濾式呼吸器由奈及利亞標準組織（SON）監管，SON發佈的奈及利亞工業標準（NIS）通常就過濾式半面罩採納EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）。市場准入受強制性SON合格評定計劃（SONCAP）控制：須先取得產品證書（PC），並就每批貨物簽發SONCAP證書（SC），方可在拉各斯（阿帕帕/錫坎）或奧內港清關。中國GB 2626（KN95）檢測報告本身不滿足NIS/EN 149的合格評定基礎；須有針對所採納標準的獲認可檢測報告及一名註冊的在地進口商。醫用口罩則由NAFDAC監管。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator (SON, NAFDAC), standards body, or primary legal source preferred.
